call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car down payment, actually. 
Agent: Perfect! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, I think so. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. 
Eleanor: Okay. That sounds reasonable. 
Agent: Wonderful! So, to proceed, I just need to verify a few details… your address is still Denver, Colorado? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's correct. 
Agent: Excellent. And your monthly income is around $6500? 
Eleanor: Yes. 
Agent: Fantastic. Okay, Eleanor, I'm going to go ahead and process this loan for you. You'll receive an email with the final details within the hour. 
Eleanor: Great, thank you!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving customers for a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm already getting calls from you people. 
Agent: Sir, I assure you… 
Robert: No, no, no. I'm not interested. Don't call me again! *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Yeah, that's right. They said you guys had good rates. 
Agent: Absolutely! We pride ourselves on competitive rates. We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm starting a small business, a bakery. I need equipment. 
Agent: That's fantastic! A bakery sounds wonderful. Now, with this loan, your monthly payments would be around $290 for 60 months. Have you looked at other lenders? 
Jessica: I got a quote from First National, but their rate was 8.25%. 
Agent: See? We beat that! And we have no hidden fees. Just a $150 application fee. 
Jessica: Okay, that's good. What about the terms? Can I pay it off early without penalty? 
Agent: Absolutely! No prepayment penalties whatsoever. We want to make this as flexible as possible for you. We also offer a grace period on payments if needed. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. That sounds pretty good. I need to think about it a little more, though. 
Agent: Of course. I can send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms via email. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yes, please. That would be great. 
Agent: Wonderful. I'll send that over right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. 
Michael: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card at 16.99%. 
Michael: 16.99?! That's a rip-off! And I specifically asked not to be called again! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I… uh… it's a marketing list. 
Michael: I want my number removed from your list! This is harassment! I'm filing a complaint! 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Michael: No! Just take me off your list! *click*

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Alex calling from Finance Solutions. I see you submitted an application for a personal loan online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, hello. I did. I'm a little hard of hearing, could you speak up a bit? 
Agent: Certainly, Mrs. Rodriguez. My apologies. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.99%. What were you hoping to use the loan for? 
Patricia: Well, my roof is leaking, and I need to get it fixed. It's quite urgent. 
Agent: I understand. A leaky roof is definitely a priority. The monthly payments would be approximately $175 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Patricia: Hmm, let me see… $175… yes, I think so. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $100 processing fee, and that's it. No hidden charges. 
Patricia: Oh, that's not too bad. Could you repeat the interest rate for me, dear? 
Agent: Of course. The interest rate is 14.99%. 
Patricia: 14.99… alright. I'd like to think about it overnight. Could you send me some information in the mail? I don't really trust computers, you know. 
Agent: Absolutely, Mrs. Rodriguez. I'll mail you a detailed brochure with all the loan terms. And my direct extension if you have any questions. 
Patricia: That would be lovely, thank you so much. 
Agent: You're very welcome. Have a good evening!
